   "source": [
    "df['reviews_per_month'] = df['reviews_per_month'].fillna(0)\n",

   ]

  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 15,
   "id": "c0ee0014",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))\n",
    "plt.hist(df['price'], bins=50)\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Price\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Count\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"Price Distribution\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 16,
   "id": "21c40c1c",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "-90.0 334.0\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "Q1 = df['price'].quantile(0.25)\n",
    "Q3 = df['price'].quantile(0.75)\n",
    "\n",
    "IQR = Q3 - Q1\n",
    "\n",
    "lower = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR\n",
    "upper = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR\n",
    "\n",
    "print(lower, upper)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 17,
   "id": "d9e92dd8",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "df = df[(df['price'] >= lower) & (df['price'] <= upper)]"
   ]
  },

     "text": [
      "(45887, 16)\n"
     ]

   ],

    "print(df.shape)"
   ]
  },

  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 20,
   "id": "748ce89e",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import geopandas as gpd\n",
    "from shapely.geometry import Point\n",
    "\n",
    "geometry = [Point(xy) for xy in zip(df.longitude, df.latitude)]\n",
    "\n",
    "gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(df,\n",
    "                       geometry=geometry)"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "import geopandas as gpd\n",
    "from shapely.geometry import Point\n",
    "\n",
    "geometry = [Point(xy) for xy in zip(df.longitude, df.latitude)]\n",
    "\n",
    "gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(\n",
    "    df,\n",
    "    geometry=geometry\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "gdf.head()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 24,
   "id": "241803df",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: >"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 24,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x800 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "gdf.plot(markersize=1, figsize=(8,8))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 27,
   "id": "efd4b5c2",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x800 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(12,8))\n",
    "\n",
    "scatter = plt.scatter(\n",
    "    df['longitude'],\n",
    "    df['latitude'],\n",
    "    c=np.log1p(df['price']),  # log scale\n",
    "    cmap='viridis',           # better colormap\n",
    "    s=5,\n",
    "    alpha=0.7\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.colorbar(scatter, label='Log(Price)')\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Longitude\")\n",
    "plt.ylabel(\"Latitude\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"NYC Airbnb Price Distribution\")\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 28,
   "id": "a19e1894",
   "metadata": {},

   ]

   "source": [
    "##expensive vs cheap \n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(12,8))\n",
    "\n",
    "scatter = plt.scatter(\n",
    "    df['longitude'],\n",
    "    df['latitude'],\n",
    "    c=df['price'],\n",
    "    cmap='plasma',\n",
    "    s=5,\n",
    "    alpha=0.7\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.colorbar(scatter, label='Price ($)')\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
